question.text: Changes in the PPM of Category I and II AIFs shall be intimated to investors and SEBI within:

answer.text: 1 month of the end of each financial year on a consolidated basis

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All changes in terms of the PPM and fund documents shall be intimated to investors and SEBI on a consolidated basis, within 1 month of the end of each financial year. The intimation must specifically mention the changes and include relevant revised sections. **The Trap:** The intimation is consolidated (not real-time) and filed annually. However, material changes must be informed to SEBI immediately. The annual consolidated intimation is an additional requirement. **Cross-Exam Context:** Disclosure and reporting requirements are tested in XIX-A and reflect SEBI's emphasis on investor information rights. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Stay updated on PPM changes for AIFs you've distributed. Changes to fee structure, investment strategy, or key personnel can impact your clients' investments. Review the annual PPM change intimation carefully and communicate material changes to your clients.
